{{Infobox location
| name = Dornoth III
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dornoth]] III is a planet located within the [[Dornoth system]]. Visually, the world's purple surface appears encased in a structure of satellites and metal stations, though it lacks any permanent colonies. This absence of settlement is due to the planet's volatile volcanoes, which discharge corrosive substances into its orbit. The planet is characterized by unpredictable and violent environmental hazards, including acid clouds, extreme heat, and orbital debris that can strike its surrounding satellites. During a significant conflict involving [[Aila Escalon]], the planet's atmosphere was illuminated by green light from ordnance, and a massive explosion eventually destroyed half of the world.}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dornoth]] III is a purple-surfaced planet, serving as a sister world to [[Dornoth IV]], which is encased in various satellites and metal stations. During certain events, the character of the same name can be encircled by eyes conjured by [[Horizon]]. The planet's environment has seen its clouds illuminated green by the impact of ordnance while [[Aila]]'s clones hovered above. Within its upper atmosphere, shots fired by [[Sola]] and the [[Zenith Blade]] pop back into normal time.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dornoth III]] is a sister planet to [[Dornoth IV]] and has a purple surface trapped in metal stations and satellites.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dornoth III]] is a character who can be surrounded by [[Horizon]]'s conjured eyes.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c12">''The Pilot'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dornoth III]] is a location where clouds lit up green from ordnance.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dornoth III]] is a location where [[Aila]]'s clones hovered.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dornoth III]] has an upper atmosphere where [[Sola]]'s shots and the [[Zenith Blade]]'s pop into normal time.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
